title: Epic: Integrate record-audio script into kakitori
description:
Integrate the record-audio script at ~/.local/bin/record-audio into kakitori. This adds a main recording workflow with subcommand CLI pattern (kakitori record / kakitori process).

Implementation plan: /home/agus/.claude/plans/crispy-inventing-bonbon.md

Key changes:
- Port record-audio as native module (not external script)
- Subcommand pattern: 'kakitori record' and 'kakitori process <file>'
- Prompt to transcribe after recording
- Use questionary/rich for UI consistency
- Audio normalization kept separate (different epic)

title: Fix Ctrl+C not exiting outside of audio recording
description: Signal handler in recorder.py was not being restored after recording, causing Ctrl+C to not properly exit in subsequent prompts. Fix: Save original handler and restore it in finally block.

title: Research screen capture approaches for Linux
description: Investigate different methods for screen capture on Linux (Wayland/X11): 1) FFmpeg with screen capture (x11grab for X11, KMS for Wayland), 2) wf-recorder for Wayland, 3) OBS libraries, 4) gstreamer pipelines. Evaluate synchronization with audio recording, performance impact, resolution/frame rate considerations, and multi-monitor support.

title: Research transcript analysis approaches and options
description: Research different approaches for analyzing transcripts using LLMs. Explore various analysis types: conversation summaries, participant posture analysis, action items/next steps extraction, conclusions, and other useful analysis patterns. Consider prompt engineering strategies and structured output formats.

title: Epic: Normalize audio volume in record-audio script
description: Adjust the record-audio script to normalize audio volume, handling different recording sources that produce varying volume levels. This ensures consistent audio levels for better transcription quality.

title: Detect speaker names from conversation clues in transcription
description: Enhanced transcription prompt to instruct Gemini to detect actual speaker names from conversation clues (e.g., 'Hey John...'). title: Research real-time transcription streaming approaches
description: Investigate methods for real-time transcription during recording: 1) Gemini API streaming capabilities and chunk size requirements, 2) Buffering strategies for audio segments, 3) WebSocket vs HTTP streaming, 4) Handling partial transcripts and speaker diarization in real-time, 5) Error recovery and reconnection handling, 6) Memory management for long recordings, 7) UI considerations for displaying live transcript updates.

title: Add participant count to transcription process
description: Add -p/--participants CLI flag for specifying number of participants. Prompt interactively if not provided. Include count in transcription prompt to improve speaker diarization accuracy.

title: Research audio normalization techniques and tools

title: Update command.py orchestration: integrate sink lifecycle with proper cleanup in finally block
Fix cross-device link error when moving recording from /tmp
description:
Error: [Errno 18] Invalid cross-device link when moving temp recording to final location.

The issue is in record/recorder.py using Path.rename() which doesn't work across filesystems. Need to use shutil.move() instead.

Error occurred: temp_path.rename(output_path) fails when /tmp and target are on different filesystems.
